key_items: Spot Bitcoin ETFs shed $1B in single week, snapping six-week inflow run amid macro uncertainty and AI stock rotation
US Treasury yields surge to new highs as bond market reclaims control, pushing Bitcoin below $82,000 resistance
US CLARITY Act generates bullish sentiment but Santiment warns crypto typically moves against crowd expectations
reasoning: Bitcoin faces conflicting pressures: negative institutional flows ($1B ETF outflows), rising Treasury yields constraining risk assets, and macro uncertainty offset somewhat by regulatory clarity tailwinds (CLARITY Act) and institutional adoption signals (Mubadala, Trump family, Winklevoss). The divergence between sentiment-driven euphoria and actual capital flows suggests a consolidation phase rather than decisive directional move.
risks: Escalating Treasury yields and potential Fed rate-hike concerns could trigger rapid deleveraging of overleveraged retail positions, particularly given record leveraged ETF inflows creating fragile technical support near $80,000.
